# Test complex struct with various field types

exec sourcereflect -pretty -type ComplexType complex.go
cmp stdout expected.json

-- complex.go --
package main

import "time"

type ComplexType struct {
	ID          string            `json:"id"`
	Created     time.Time         `json:"created_at"`
	Updated     *time.Time        `json:"updated_at,omitempty"`
	Status      Status            `json:"status"`
	Tags        []string          `json:"tags,omitempty"`
	Attributes  map[string]any    `json:"attributes"`
	Children    []*ComplexType    `json:"children,omitempty"`
	Parent      *ComplexType      `json:"parent,omitempty"`
	IsActive    bool              `json:"is_active"`
	Score       float64           `json:"score"`
	Data        interface{}       `json:"data,omitempty"`
}

type Status int

const (
	StatusPending Status = iota
	StatusActive
	StatusInactive
)

-- expected.json --
{
  "type": "object",
  "title": "ComplexType",
  "properties": {
    "attributes": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": {
        "type": "object",
        "title": "any"
      }
    },
    "children": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "title": "ComplexType"
      }
    },
    "created_at": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time"
    },
    "data": {
      "type": "object"
    },
    "id": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "is_active": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "parent": {
      "type": "object",
      "title": "ComplexType"
    },
    "score": {
      "type": "number"
    },
    "status": {
      "type": "object",
      "title": "Status"
    },
    "tags": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "updated_at": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "id",
    "created_at",
    "status",
    "attributes",
    "is_active",
    "score"
  ]
}
